# Seed Atlas legal notice

Seed Atlas 4.2.dev0 is free software distributed under the GNU General Public
License version 3. See `LICENSE` for the complete license text.

Seed Atlas is a modified version of Cubiomes Viewer by Cubitect. The original
project is available at https://github.com/Cubitect/cubiomes-viewer.

This modified version was prepared on 14 July 2026. It contains substantial
interface, mapping, analysis-panel, toolbar, settings, packaging, and Windows
installer changes. It is not an official Cubitect release.

Copyright notices belonging to the original authors remain in effect. New
modifications are distributed under GPLv3 without any warranty.

Seed Atlas is not an official Minecraft product and is not approved by or
associated with Mojang or Microsoft.
